validation_rules.Passport: Must be valid for the duration of the student's stay in Australia.
validation_rules.CoE: Must be issued by a CRICOS-registered provider and match details of the visa application.
validation_rules.OSHC: Overseas Student Health Cover must cover the applicant from arrival date until the planned visa end date.
validation_rules.Bank Statements: Must show liquid funds covering 1st year tuition plus AU$29,710 living costs. Must be held by a recognized bank and show clean source history.

critical_rules: Verify the OSHC dates cover the complete visa period.
CoE status must be active in PRISMS.
Financial statements must be from an acceptable financial institution (APRA approved).
ai_instructions: Check that OSHC health cover spans the entire targeted course duration and verify that the financial amounts meet the AU$29,710 living cost threshold.
pass_examples: Active CoE attached, OSHC covers 2 years, bank statements show AU$50,000 liquid funds.
fail_examples: OSHC expires 6 months before program completion, bank statements show property values instead of liquid savings.
